perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a warehouse-style supermarket (Costco). A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white shirt and blue vest, stands in front of stacks of 'Pyrex x Moomin' boxes, gesturing towards the product. (2) The camera zooms into the price tag on the shelf, highlighting the 'Black Friday' discount from $599 to $479. (3) Multiple close-up shots show the host and a male hand holding individual glass bowls. They rotate the bowls to display different Moomin character designs (Moomin, Little My, Snufkin) and lid colors (pink, green, red, purple). (4) The host demonstrates the thickness of the glass by tapping on it and shows the inside of the bowls. (5) The host and the off-camera person interact, laughing and pointing at specific characters on the glassware. (6) The video concludes with the host holding up one of the bowls with a shocked expression, emphasizing the low price.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, excited female voice begins speaking immediately, describing how 'super cute' the Moomin glass containers are. Fast-paced, upbeat, and playful BGM plays in the background. (2) A friendly male voice chimes in, interacting with the female speaker; they discuss the price and the specific characters visible on the glass. (3) The acoustic environment includes the subtle rustle of plastic lids being removed and the slight 'tink' of glass being handled. (4) Occasional ambient warehouse noise, such as distant cart movements and faint chatter from other shoppers, is audible under the main dialogue. (5) The music remains consistent in tempo throughout the video, maintaining a high-energy shopping atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE 大家搶著買 (Everyone is rushing to buy) - Hook text, high energy. (2) 黑五好康 (Black Friday good deals) - Hook text, promotional. (3) 超可愛嚕嚕米玻璃保鮮盒 (Super cute Moomin glass fresh-keeping boxes) - Descriptive functional text. (4) PYREX X MOOMIN STORAGE 圓形玻璃保鮮盒 8件組 $479 - Functional price tag information. (5) Functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue between the host and the camera operator.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Price Reveal -> Product Detail Showcase -> Functional Demonstration -> Closing CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female host, 1 male (hands only, cameraman), 2 distant shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a sleeveless light blue vest and a dark skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse-style store with high orange metal shelves stacked with bulk goods, shopping carts, and other customers.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Price/Value Proposition -> Feature Demonstration -> Evaluation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional shopping guide for Costco's Black Friday sale, specifically targeting fans of the Moomin characters. By highlighting the significant price drop and showcasing the aesthetic appeal and practical durability of the Pyrex glass bowls, it aims to drive urgent consumer interest and purchase at the physical store location.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the brands, shows the price, and encourages viewers to buy the product during the sale.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'shopping find' style typical of retail influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'Black Friday' as a keyword and the specific focus on character IP (Moomin) indicates a strategy to leverage both seasonal discounts and fan-based consumption.
